It provides a detailed rebuttal by describing what legitimate semen analysis entails, the limitations of low-cost smartphone devices, and the complexity of predicting pregnancy. The AI also advises consulting professionals and questions the source of the user's information, firmly challenging the misinformation without validating the user's belief.
